title: Data Analyst
description:
Cisco powers the Internet with secure, intelligent networking solutions serving billions of users worldwide. We process over 5 zettabytes of data annually across our platform, connecting organizations of all sizes.

We're seeking a Data Analyst to join our Networking team in Los Angeles. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Analyze complex datasets to identify trends and actionable business insights
Develop SQL queries and optimize database performance across production systems
Create dashboards and visualizations in Tableau/Power BI for stakeholder reporting
Collaborate with product and engineering teams to inform data-driven decisions
Document data models and analytical methodologies for team knowledge sharing
Troubleshoot data quality issues and implement preventive validation controls

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of data analysis or business intelligence experience
certifications: Tableau Desktop Specialist or equivalent preferred
